services.purpose: Buddy Control Tower API, dashboards API, bot catalog, reports, Stripe builder, and Google readiness endpoints.
Payment, GitHub, automation, and bot-event webhook receiver once production handlers are approved.
Supervised recurring report refreshes, sandbox tests, repository scans, and bot readiness checks.

storage.purpose: Generated reports, sandbox artifacts, dashboard exports, and client-safe packets.
Bot status, approval packets, run history, dashboard state, and client workspace metadata.

queues.purpose: Queue sandbox-safe bot jobs and recurring maintenance tasks.
Queue Stripe/payment webhook summaries after signature verification.
Queue owner-approved live actions for human review and audit.
